meaning: n.撒尔沙植物,由撒尔沙根中提炼的药
examples: It's the American equivalent of ginger beer, but flavoured with sassafras and sarsaparilla roots.
The taxi driver hands me a polythene bag of Sarsi (a sarsaparilla-based soft drink) and ice. A kind gesture.
European maritime sedge naturalized along Atlantic coast of United States; rootstock has properties of sarsaparilla.
